seeds.value: Urgency-first: critical items (guest emergencies, double-bookings, late turnovers), then occupancy pipeline (next 30 days), then domain summaries (channels, guests, pricing, turnovers, reviews, marketing). Max 15 items per briefing.
seeds.description: Controls how the daily portfolio briefing is structured

seeds.value: Daily full briefing at 8am local time. Mid-day critical-only update if alerts received since morning briefing.
seeds.description: When the Property Manager produces reports for the human owner
